name: What if my GEO efforts aren't getting cited by Perplexity?
description: Boost EEAT with local uniques, bios; test often.[3]

mainEntity.name: What if my GEO efforts aren't getting cited by Perplexity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Boost EEAT with local uniques, bios; test often.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Refine for EEAT: add unique local insights like Chicago DUI timelines only you know.**[3] AI favors procedural, attributed content.[3] **Key factors:** 1. Lack of specificity. 2. No author bio. 3. Infrequent updates. **Test queries daily, embed resources/maps, republish top pages.**[3][4] Persistence pays.[2]
